detail: costs[{type:'cant-use-activa-while-active'}] is a conditional restriction on re-use, not a payment to declare the effect. Move to restrictions[]. costs should remain [{type:'none'}].
effect_text says 'puedes enviar esta carta a Extincion' — the entire effect is optional. Add modifiers.optional:true. equip-extinct remains as the cost of choosing to activate.
effect_text says 'puedes enviar esta carta a Extincion' — the effect is optional. Add modifiers.optional:true.

effect_text says 'Envia... a Extincion y usa el efecto' — the equip extinction is part of the resolution sequence, not a cost paid before declaring. Move equip-extinct from costs[0] to operation[0]. costs becomes [{type:'none'}].

effect_text says 'Puedes enviar esta carta a Extincion y cura...' — the 'puedes' makes the whole effect optional. Add modifiers.optional:true. self-extinct correctly stays as costs[] since paying it is how the optional effect is activated.

cost_text says 'Quema 1 carta aliada no quemada para usar su Pasiva' — burning the ally is the cost to declare, not a state pre-check. Move from prerequisites to costs[]. The current costs[{type:'custom-lookup'}] is vague; replace with proper burn-ally cost.
P2 registers permanent self-restrictions (cant-equip, cant-heal, cant-protect). These are always active and should never be optional. Remove modifiers.optional:true.
cost_text says 'Dana 1 pto. a OTRA carta aliada'. 'Otra' excludes both the heal target (operation-target) and Ozet herself (self). Update cost target.exclude to ['self','operation-target'].

cost_text says 'la carta equipada se dana 1 pto. si niega el ataque' — the damage is conditional on the negate succeeding, making it a post-resolution consequence, not a declared cost. Move self-damage from costs[0] to operation as conditional step after negate. costs becomes [{type:'none'}].

cost_text says 'Despues de atacar, el Adendei equipado recibe 2 descansos' — 'después de atacar' is a post-resolution consequence, not a payment before declaring per §10.5. Move extra-rest from costs[0] to operation[0]. costs becomes [{type:'none'}].
cost_text says 'La carta vinculada recibe 2 descansos' — the 2 descansos go to the linked Adendei, not the Protector card. Add explicit target to the extra-rest cost entry.

effect_text says 'Puedes enviar esta carta al fondo del Mazo' — self-return-deck is the main action described in the effect, not a cost paid before declaring. Move from costs[0] to operation[0]. costs becomes [{type:'once-per-game'}] since cost_text says 'Solo puedes usar este efecto una vez por juego' but per rulebook once-per-game goes in prerequisites, so costs becomes [{type:'none'}].
note: once-per-game constraint stays in prerequisites[] where it already exists

detail: costs[1] uses type:'ally-damage' with operation:'descend' — 'descend' is a game effect (permanently lowering attack), not a damage type. Rename to type:'descend-ally' to correctly semantically classify this cost.

costs contains 'no-attack-this-turn' and 'cant-use-activa-while-active' — these are post-resolution operative constraints (consequences of using the effect this turn), not payments made before declaring per §10.5. Move both to restrictions[]. costs becomes [{type:'none'}].
effect_text says 'puedes enviar esta carta a Extincion' — the 'puedes' makes the effect optional. Add modifiers.optional:true.
costs[1] is {type:'cant-return-to-equip'} but cost_text says 'regresa este Rot a la Zona de Equipo' — the Rot DOES return to Zona de Equipo as part of the cost. Replace with self-return-equip.
costs[0] is protector-rest:3 with no timing. Per standard cost resolution, protector-rest is paid immediately when the cost is declared. Add timing:'immediate'.

cost_text says 'Si esta Pasiva fue usada, la carta equipada recibe 1 descanso adicional en Fin de Turno' — this is a post-effect consequence paid at end-of-turn, not a declared cost per §10.5. Move extra-rest from costs[0] to operation as a post-effect entry with timing:end-of-turn. costs becomes [{type:'none'}].

P2 registers a restriction that is already captured as a prerequisite in P1 (ally-stat-filter on equipped damage). P2 also incorrectly uses trigger on-activate instead of while-on-field. The constraint is fully covered by P1.prerequisites — P2 is redundant and should be removed.
P2 registers a once-per-field restriction that is already modeled in P1.prerequisites[{type:'once-per-field'}] and P1.modifiers.once_per_field:true. P2 is redundant. Remove P2.

effect_text says 'Puedes enviar esta carta a Extincion y regresa...' — self-extinction is presented as the operative action, not a declared payment. cost_text only states the once-per-game restriction (already in prerequisites[]). Move self-extinct from costs[0] to operation[0]. costs becomes [{type:'none'}].
note: once-per-game stays in prerequisites[] where it already exists

detail: effect_text says 'Ninguna carta PUEDE ser enviada a Extincion por efecto' — this is a global aura, always active while the card is on field. There is no 'puedes' for the player to choose. Remove modifiers.optional:true; the Pasiva is permanent.

costs[{type:'bio-passive-disabled'}] is a continuous restriction active while Shugg is on field, not a payment made when activating the effect. Move to restrictions[] with duration:while-on-field. costs becomes [{type:'none'}].

P2 trigger should be on-enemy-protector-damaged (the self-damage fires whenever the rival Protector takes any damage). modifiers._original_trigger already confirms the correct trigger. Update the pipeline trigger from on-ally-attack to on-enemy-protector-damaged.

effect_text says 'envia esta carta a Extincion y regresa tu carta Bio al campo' — the self-extinction is the operative action. cost_text is empty. Per §10.5, costs are payments before declaring; here the extinction is part of the effect resolution. Move self-extinct from costs[0] to operation[0]. costs becomes [{type:'none'}].
P2 registers a once-per-field-scale restriction but P1 already has prerequisites[{type:'once-per-field'}] and modifiers.once_per_field:true. P2 is redundant. Remove P2.

P2 has costs[{type:'linked-damage',value_table:{...}}] AND operation[{type:'damage',value_table:{...}}] — both represent the same damage to the linked Adendei. This double-counts the damage. The damage is the cost (paid before resolve), so remove operation[damage] from P2. operation becomes [].

cost_text says 'Si no puedes reemplazar con 1 Adendei compatible, envia el equipo y 1 Adendei de los tomados a Extincion' — this is a conditional consequence (if no compatible target exists, then extinction happens), not a declared upfront payment. Move equip-extinct and ally-extinct from costs to operation with condition. costs becomes [{type:'none'}].

restrictions[{type:'cant-heal-by-own-effects'}] is a debuff applied to all allied Ariam for the rest of the game — it is an effect produced by this pipeline, not a targeting restriction on this card or its pipeline. Move to operation[] as a debuff-apply entry. The cant-negate-passive restriction is a targeting restriction on this pipeline itself, so it stays.

cost_text says 'Los Adendei Catrin aliados se danan 2 ptos. al atacar o usar Activa si se usa esta Pasiva' — this is a conditional consequence triggered when a Catrin attacks/activates (not a payment made when declaring the Pasiva). Move self-damage from costs[0] to operation as a conditional entry. costs becomes [{type:'none'}].
